message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["5","[[0, 1, 2, 5, 4], [1, 2, 3, 7, 3], [0, 2, 6, 12, 10], [2, 3, 4, 3, 5], [3, 4, 1, 5, 2]]","[2, 4]","10","20"],"focus":"Exact-boundary time and capacity: path sums equal global limits; alternatives exist that exceed constraints."},{"input_lines":["4","[[0, 1, 1, 2, 1], [1, 1, 1, 1, 0], [1, 2, 2, 2, 2], [2, 3, 3, 3, 3], [0, 3, 10, 10, 10]]","[1, 1, 3]","7","8"],"focus":"Repeated mandatory checkpoint requiring a revisit (uses self-loop); order and multiplicity matter; tight limits."},{"input_lines":["7","[[0, 1, 1, 5, 2], [1, 2, 3, 6, 1], [2, 4, 4, 5, 5], [1, 3, 2, 10, 1], [3, 4, 2, 12, 1], [4, 5, 1, 3, 2], [5, 6, 2, 4, 2], [3, 6, 8, 30, 1], [4, 6, 7, 15, 5], [2, 3, 1, 2, 3]]","[1, 4, 6]","15","18"],"focus":"Cheapest-seeming route violates capacity constraints; only a costlier path is feasible — distinguishes capacity-aware solutions."}]}
